title: Falta election result LIVE: ECI counts votes amid tight security; BJP's Debangshu Panda leads by huge margin
description: Falta election results LIVE: Among key candidates in this seat are BJP's Debangshu Panda and the Congress's Abdul Razzak Molla. In a surprise development just ahead of the repoll, TMC's Jahangir Khan had announced the withdrawal of his nomination.
